name: Centaurus Energy Inc.
summary: Centaurus Energy Inc., an independent upstream oil and gas company, explores, develops, and produces crude oil, natural gas liquids, and natural gas. The company holds approximately 950,000 net acres located in Argentina. Its primary producing concessions include Puesto Morales, Palmar Largo, and Surubi. The company was formerly known as Madalena Energy Inc. and changed its name to Centaurus Energy Inc. in September 2019. Centaurus Energy Inc. is based in Calgary, Alberta.
